# World

Singapore, 2041. Post-climate-treaty, still humid; cooling-corridors shade
every major pedestrian spine. The civic layer runs on a state-operated
"Marginalia" implant — a cortical co-processor that rents out blocks of
the wearer's short-term working memory to buyers registered with the
Monetary Authority. The implant's manufacturer, NeuroPacific Ltd, ships
a hard-coded attestation protocol the courts rely on.

## Technology rules (hard limits)

Replace with at least three hard limits after `/autonovel:gen-world`.
